SpTU 1, 171 [Muššu’u 1][via cams/gkab]

flake
flakeflake NaN  (start of column missing)
flake 1'flake 1'

[x ši-in]-⸢gurum-ma sa⸣ [...]

It (a demon) contracts the [...], [...] the sinews.

flake 2'2'

[sa-sal]-⸢la⸣ eš₂ maḫ-gin₇ [...]

[...] the achilles tendon like a great rope.

flake 3'3'

[uzusa] ⸢umbin⸣ [...]

[...] the nerves.

flake 4'4'

[...] ninda₂da šu [...]

[...] a hand to the seed funnel [...].

flake 5'5'

[...] ⸢munu₄-gin₇⸣ [...]

[...] like malt [...].
